name: shravan-dev-workflow
description: Codex-first development workflow plugin with goal orchestration, spec design swarms, discuss-with-me thinking clarification, docs maintenance, adversarial council review, security scan routing, implementation review orchestration, plan workflows, debugging, skill audits, TUI presentation guidance, and PM Linear work.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-first workflow with spec design, review, security routing, debugging, TUI, and PM
interface.longDescription: Use Shravan Dev Workflow to shape specs with bounded design swarms, turn clear long-horizon work into verifiable Codex or Claude /goal contracts, clarify and pressure-test unclear design/spec/plan/implementation/docs decisions with discuss-with-me, maintain docs and workflow artifact lifecycle, adversarially review drafted specs with council lanes, route explicit security audits to the official Codex Security workflows, and run evidence-backed implementation reviews with bounded reviewer lanes, Codex subagents as the default and majority backend, plus optional Claude or Gemini/agy lanes when requested. It also validates and addresses accepted review findings, packages copy-pasteable plan and implementation handoffs, runs plan-review swarms or validate-execute written plans with controller-owned verification, writes lane artifacts for clear spec/plan/debug work unless chat-only/no-files was requested, investigates bugs before fixes, audits skills from real session evidence, and includes TUI presentation guidance plus PM Linear work organization.
defaultPrompt: Use spec-design-swarm to shape this design before planning.
Use discuss-with-me to clarify and pressure-test this decision before editing files.
Use orchestrate-goal to turn this into a verifiable long-horizon goal.
Use docs-maintain to reconcile these docs with current code and plans.
Use spec-review-council to attack this spec before implementation.
Use security-router to choose the right Codex Security scan.
Investigate this bug before fixing it.
Audit these skills against session evidence.
